rationale: Educ. Code §26.006 governs parental access to teaching and instructional materials. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative relationship to this provision.
quote: Sec. 26.006. ACCESS TO TEACHING MATERIALS. (a) A parent is entitled to:
_note: No conflict; rule concerns parental access to teaching materials, unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
